title: daphne holosericea var. holosericea
intro: Daphne holosericea var. holosericea, also known as the Spurge laurel or Chinese daphne, is a deciduous shrub native to China, characterized by its glossy, dark green leaves and small, white flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating various health issues such as fever, cough, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Daphne holosericea var. holosericea include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being and longevity.
